name: Willdan Group, Inc.
summary: Willdan Group, Inc. is a provider of professional, technical, and consulting services to utilities, private industry, and public agencies. Founded in 1964, the company offers energy efficiency programs, engineering, construction management, program design, AI data center power solutions, greenhouse gas reduction services, and government infrastructure consulting. It operates through two segments: Energy (85% of revenue) and Engineering and Consulting (15%), serving clients across 22 states, D.C., Puerto Rico, and Alberta, Canada.

products.name: Energy Efficiency Programs
products.description: Comprehensive energy audits, program design, benchmarking, and installation of energy efficiency measures for utilities and public agencies.

products.name: AI Data Center Power Solutions
products.description: Specialized energy planning and power solutions addressing increased demand from AI-driven data centers.

products.name: Performance Contracting
products.description: Alternative financing and performance-based energy savings contracts for public and private clients.

products.name: Grid Optimization Services
products.description: Demand reduction and grid optimization solutions for utilities and municipalities.

products.name: Software and Data Analytics
products.description: Data analytics and software tools supporting energy planning and program management for clients.

products.name: Engineering and Construction Management
products.description: Design, construction oversight, and infrastructure project management for public agencies and utilities.

products.name: Municipal Engineering Services
products.description: Acting as municipal engineers and building/safety departments for local governments.

products.name: Economic and Financial Consulting
products.description: Grant support, funding advisory, and economic consulting for public agency infrastructure projects.

products.name: Traffic and Transportation Engineering
products.description: Traffic studies, plan reviews, inspections, and transportation engineering for local governments.
